case_title: EDWARDO ESCULLAR COMBES VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE et al

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER FILED BY DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE AND BANK OF AMERICA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ADDRESS ALL ISSUES RAISED BY DEMURRER AT TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR (1) DECLARATORY RELIEF; (2) NEGLIGENCE; (3) NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION; (4) VIOLATIONS OF ROSENTHAL ACT; (5) ACCOUNTING; AND (6) INJUNCTIVE RELIEF. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE 10 DAYS FROM THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO FILE AN AMEND COMPLAINT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2013 Continued To Jan-08-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE and BANK OF AMERICA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to address all issues raised by demurrer at to causes of action for (1) declaratory relief; (2) negligence; (3) negligent misrepresentation; (4) violations of Rosenthal Act; (5) Accounting; and (6) Injunctive relief. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from the notice of entry of order to file an amend complaint. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-19-2013 Continued To Oct-07-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, BANK OF AMERICA SAND RECONTRUST COMPANYS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to October 7, 2013 on Court's own motion. Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Mars Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Continued To Sep-19-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. & RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - Transferred to Department 501, the Real Property Court, to be heard on September 19, 2013. (See Local Rule 8.10.) Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the Complaint per Local Rule 2.6C to Department 501, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 19, 2013. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
